name: grok
tagline: Orchestration guide for delegating coding tasks (features, PRs, refactors) to the xAI Grok Build CLI via headless or interactive sessions.
verdict: Thorough, versioned, well-exemplified orchestration doc with strong failure-mode coverage. Key risk: it offers 'curl https://x.ai/cli/install.sh | bash' as a working alternate install method rather than only npm, a piped-shell-execution pattern the rubric always fails regardless of brand. gh CLI and tmux are used repeatedly without being declared as.

highlights.summary: Presents 'curl -fsSL https://x.ai/cli/install.sh | bash' as a working alternate install method, not solely as a discouraged pattern.
'npm install -g @xai-official/grok' is unpinned (no version) and installed globally from an unverified scope name.
Description ('Delegate coding to xAI Grok Build CLI (features, PRs)') states what it does but not an explicit trigger phrase.
